# Deploy & DNS Instructions — D.C. Masonry

## Live URLs

- **Vercel preview:** https://dc-masonry.vercel.app
- **Custom domain (apex):** https://dcmasonry.waylandandco.com
- **Custom domain (www):** https://www.dcmasonry.waylandandco.com

## DNS Records

Add the following records to your DNS provider (registrar — GoDaddy, Namecheap, Cloudflare, Squarespace, etc.):

### Apex domain (dcmasonry.waylandandco.com)

| Type | Name | Value | TTL |
|------|------|-------|-----|
| A | @ | 76.76.21.21 | Auto / 3600 |

### www subdomain

| Type | Name | Value | TTL |
|------|------|-------|-----|
| CNAME | www | cname.vercel-dns.com | Auto / 3600 |

## Step-by-step (most registrars)

1. Log into your DNS provider's dashboard
2. Find the DNS settings for dcmasonry.waylandandco.com
3. **Delete** any existing A record for @ pointing somewhere else
4. **Add** the A record above for @
5. **Delete** any existing CNAME for www
6. **Add** the CNAME record above for www
7. Save changes
8. Wait 5–60 minutes for propagation. Check at <https://dnschecker.org>

## Verification

Once DNS propagates, both URLs should serve the live site over HTTPS (Vercel provisions SSL automatically). If you see a security warning or "Vercel" 404 page, DNS hasn't fully propagated yet.

To check verification status on Vercel, visit <https://vercel.com/dashboard/domains> while signed in.

## Common DNS Providers

- **Cloudflare:** DNS tab → "Add record". Set Proxy status to "DNS only" (gray cloud) for Vercel.
- **GoDaddy:** Domain settings → DNS → DNS Management.
- **Namecheap:** Domain List → Manage → Advanced DNS.
- **Squarespace Domains:** Domain → DNS Settings.

## Need Help?

If DNS isn't propagating after 1 hour, contact us: dcmasonryinc@gmail.com
